subject: 关于开展商业计划二季度专项点检工作的通知
body:
孟总、杨总，好：
为持续跟进公司商业计划的执行进度，及时识别目标偏差并制定改进措施，确保年度经营目标及各项方针顺利推进。继一季度商业计划点检交流会后，企管将组织开展二季度商业计划专项点检工作。后面将每季度持续轮动开展。
鉴于
4
月
29
日公司已组织各部门汇报了近期工作开展情况，为精简流程、提高点检效率，本次点检将不安排部门工作汇报环节，
直接聚焦于公司商业计划、部门业绩合同中约定内容，点检截至当前的关键里程碑节点目标及关键交付物完成情况
。
为保障本次点检工作有序推进，现将具体安排通知如下：
一、流程安排
本次点检分为两个阶段进行：
(一)
第一阶段（现场资料核查）
Ø
参会人员：企管、被检部门指定配合人员。
Ø
内容：依据商业计划
/
业绩合同，逐项核查关键节点目标及交付物的完成情况与佐证材料。
(二)
第二阶段（结果通报会议）
Ø
参会人员：企管、被检部门经理、分管领导及部门指定人员，视情况邀请管理层参会。
Ø
内容：通报第一阶段的核查发现，确认目标偏差及后续改进要求。
二、日程安排

，另行通知
以上日程安排，如有时间冲突，请反馈给我，以便调整安排。
请技术中心、工业工程中心提前梳理、收集相关交付物及佐证材料，文件打包备好台账，并指定专人配合本次点检工作。
配合人员请提前反馈给我
，以便工作对接，谢谢。
以上，特此通知！
绩效管理部
2026
年

9
日

Dear Jan,
Morning to you.
Just as you said that the start of 2026 was bad. There were three months are loss-making status for Moerdijk and Barneveld depots this year. Especially, the significant
losses in April for Moerdijk have drawn  attention and concern from the top management. Mr.Jee requires all of us to cooperate in thoroughly investigating the root causes of the losses and making effective improvement measures to quickly turn losses into profits.
So let’s work together for that target from Mr.Jee.
In order to make things clear for the first step, we have the following work suggestions :
Provide the detailed material cost breakdown for each  orders (including order types
、
incomes
etc.) in April.
As for the business of  new build  in Moerdijk, the material cost rate is about 10% in April, is that means the new tank containers delivered to Moerdijk from CIMC
Safeway?
As for the new build business in Barneveld, the material cost rate is about 68% in April, would you like to supply us the gross
profit margin for that new build business in Barneveld.
Burg Service has 46 full-time employees and 7 temporary workers according to Burg’s payroll of last month. What is the rules for headcount management
and salary adjustment?
The lease term for the additional container yard near Moerdijk is about to expire, does Burg
need to renew all or part of the lease?
Please reply to the above within two weeks.
Please add material cost rate
、
gross
profit margin
、
expense rate and the year to year changes based on the format of
monthly Management Info.
Please finish that in the second quarter this year.

submit Burg’s profit improvement roadmap (objectives +measures +responsible persons) for the second half of this year and next three years(2027-2029).
Please finish that in the third quarter this year.

：
The spare parts you ordered from head office are being packed and will be shipped to you soon, hope that will help you.

Many Thanks & Best Regards

Fred

Morning to you.

Especially, the significant losses in April for Moerdijk have drawn  attention and concern from the top management. So let’s work together for that target from Mr.Jee.

Provide the detailed material cost breakdown for each  orders (including order types
、
incomes etc.) in April.
As for the business of  new build  in Moerdijk, the material cost rate is about 10% in April, is that means the new tank containers delivered to Moerdijk from CIMC Safeway?
As for the new build business in Barneveld, the material cost rate is about 68% in April, would you like to supply us the gross profit margin for that new build business in Barneveld.
Burg Service has 46 full-time employees and 7 temporary workers according to Burg’s payroll of last month. What is the rules for headcount management and salary adjustment?
The lease term for the additional container yard near Moerdijk is about to expire, does Burg need to renew all or part of the lease?
Please reply to the above within two weeks.

、

、

：
The spare parts you ordered from head office are being packed and will be shipped to you soon, hope that will help you.

Good morning Fred and Allan,
Enclosed the management info over April 2026.
Amount of tankcontainers in storage 2.934 with our limits at 3.500 units.
Workload tankcontainers Moerdijk 1.235 hours which means approx. 2 weeks workload.
Workload tanktrailers Moerdijk 1.465 hours which means approx. 3 weeks workload.
Workload newbuild milktrailers Barneveld 10375 hours which means delivery time for newbuild +/- 9 months.
Workload repair and parts Barneveld 680 hours which means approx. 3 weeks fully booked.
For the moment the workload containers to low and for near future still uncertain, this give me big worries at the moment.
Problem still to find and to keep skilled workers, many indirect hours due to internal schooling.
At this moment we have to face that some workers are leaving, our depot manager Barneveld will leave 12 June 2026.
Sick leave level until now becomes lower.
Start of 2026 was bad due to all this reasons.
After the good meeting with Alex McConagle in Barneveld we are waiting now for the tank delivery to Barneveld.
Sparepart delivery from CIMC Safeway – Nantong still ongoing discuss and no delivery of part until now !
Started up the design of a sparepart webshop to get more revenues from that side together with implementation of Depot Soft.
Further investigations and implementation of Depot Soft, hope we can start beginning Mai 2026.
Trust to have informed you sufficient for the moment and if any questions please do not hesitate to contact me.
With kind regards,
Jan Bunk
Managing Director

Middenweg 6

Mob.     +31 (0) 653 15 58 93

Re: Management Info April 2026
Dear Jan,
Thank you for sending the management information as usual.
With regards to the tank to be delivered to Barneveld, Darren is handling that. I will contact him so that he will keep you posted.
As for the spare parts, you can hardly believe getting them ready has been su a big work load! We will probably need 2 off 40 footers. I went to the warehouse before our early May vacation started. The parts will be packed when we return from our vacation. We will start to book the shipping soon. In this respect, we will advise you of shipment details once available.
Just for your advance information, Ms Zhu will visit Barneveld in June, trying to help you guys, in particular, on the improvements related to production line layout, equipment/jig as well as supply chain. This will be phase one.
Thank you very much!
Allan
